data.content:
Shipment artifact:
- Integrated to `origin/main` from `foolery-55b2-no-browser-start`
- Main commit: `1558a00eaf237a2d334a1daca2a424084a79fb25`
- Remote CI status: `ci=success`, `coverage=success`
- Scope: `foolery start` and therefore `foolery restart` no longer open a browser implicitly; `foolery open` remains the explicit browser-opening path.
